subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! At this hour the Lamp that burneth before His countenance speaketh forth these words: The Day of God hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد در این حین سراج که امام وجه مشتعل باین کلمه ناطق یوم الهی ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
